name: @llm-ports/example-live-integration-tests
description: Live API-backed integration tests that exercise the full LLMPort surface against real provider APIs. Each script proves one slice of the contract end-to-end: single-provider generateText + generateStructured, OpenAI-only fallback chain (surrogate), real Anthropic adapter with Zod tool-use, and a real cross-adapter Anthropic+OpenAI fallback. Used to close Gate C of the publishing checklist and as a reproducible bake before each prerelease bump.

scripts.smoke:all: node live.mjs && node live-multi-provider.mjs && node live-anthropic.mjs && node live-cross-adapter-chain.mjs && node live-vision.mjs && node live-compat-providers.mjs
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('no build step; .mjs files run directly')"
